title: SseStreamState named struct: scan_from char-boundary invariant is documented
description: The scan_from field carries a non-obvious invariant (must be valid UTF-8 char boundary of buf). It is documented in the field-level doc comment. The char-boundary walk-back code is also present and correct. A contributor removing the walk-back thinking it is unnecessary would break UTF-8 multibyte streams — the comment is the only guard against this.
close_reason: Decision record — no code change needed
